# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, edited, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read

concurrency:
  group: pr-build-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    env:
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
      PR_HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
      PR_HEAD_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
      PR_BASE_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
      NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Prepare PR metadata
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          sanitize() {
            printf "%s" "$1" | tr '\r' ' ' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g' | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]+|[[:space:]]+$//g'
          }

          title="$(sanitize "${PR_TITLE:-}")"
          body="$(sanitize "${PR_BODY:-}")"

          if [ -z "$title" ]; then
            title="PR #${PR_NUMBER}"
          fi

          if [ -z "$body" ]; then
            body="(no description)"
          fi

          body_short="$(printf "%s" "$body" | cut -c1-500)"
          title_short="$(printf "%s" "$title" | cut -c1-120)"

          printf "title=%s\n" "$title" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf "title_short=%s\n" "$title_short" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf "body=%s\n" "$body" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf "body_short=%s\n" "$body_short" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          cat > pr_metadata.json <<JSON
          {
            "pr_number": ${PR_NUMBER},
            "title": "$(python -c 'import json,os; print(json.dumps(os.environ["TITLE"])[1:-1])' TITLE="$title")",
            "description": "$(python -c 'import json,os; print(json.dumps(os.environ["BODY"])[1:-1])' BODY="$body_short")",
            "url": "${PR_URL}",
            "author": "${PR_AUTHOR}",
            "head_sha": "${PR_HEAD_SHA}",
            "head_ref": "${PR_HEAD_REF}",
            "base_ref": "${PR_BASE_REF}",
            "repo": "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}",
            "run_id": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "run_number": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}",
            "workflow": "${GITHUB_WORKFLOW}"
          }
          JSON

      - name: Create deployment-tracking commit message (local only)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          msg="build(pr#${PR_NUMBER}): ${{ steps.meta.outputs.title_short }}"
          body=$'PR: '"${PR_URL}"$'\n'"SHA: ${PR_HEAD_SHA}"$'\n\n'"${{ steps.meta.outputs.body_short }}"
          printf "%s\n\n%s\n" "$msg" "$body" > .ci_commit_message.txt
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git commit --allow-empty -F .ci_commit_message.txt || true

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Running build for PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.title }}"
          echo "Description: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.body_short }}"
          # Replace with your actual build/test commands:
          echo "Build step placeholder"

      - name: Notify (webhook)
        if: ${{ always() && env.NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          status="${{ job.status }}"
          payload="$(jq -c --arg status "$status" '. + {status: $status}' pr_metadata.json)"
          curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$payload" "$NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL"

      - name: Add PR metadata to job summary
        if: ${{ always() }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo "## PR Build Notification Context"
            echo ""
            echo "- PR: [#${PR_NUMBER}](${PR_URL})"
            echo "- Title: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.title }}"
            echo "- Description: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.body_short }}"
            echo "- Head SHA: ${PR_HEAD_SHA}"
            echo "- Status: ${{ job.status }}"
          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
